in_domain_model: Amsterdam LightGBM (trained and evaluated on Amsterdam)
transfer_model: London LightGBM (trained on London, evaluated on Amsterdam)
key_finding: The London model retains structural pricing logic (room_type, capacity) but all 22 Amsterdam neighbourhoods are unseen — the TargetEncoder falls back to the London global mean, effectively dropping neighbourhood signal for cross-city use. Retraining on Amsterdam data is required for neighbourhood-level accuracy.
